chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 46 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.514/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
